label: professional_details
value: Working part-time at a local hospital while pursuing a BSN (Bachelor of Science in Nursing).

label: health_and_wellness_preferences
value: Engaging in regular physical activities like yoga, gym workouts, or outdoor activities, practicing mindfulness and meditation, maintaining healthy eating habits with plant-based snacks high in protein, and considering strategies for managing rotating shifts and stress.

label: dietary_preferences
value: Switched to a vegetarian diet for better health and interested in easy-to-make vegetarian recipes to share with patients.

label: miscellaneous_information
value: Expanding reading interests to include historical fiction novels after enjoying some recommended by a colleague. Previously read mostly non-fiction and biographies. Interested in staying updated with new books.

label: activity_and_service_preferences
value: Interested in applying nursing skills such as patient education, community health initiatives, project management, data collection, crisis management, and nutrition to coastal conservation efforts. Specifically, planning to organize educational workshops, lead clean-up events, and set up informational booths.

label: important_personal_details
value: Joined an environmental group focused on coastal conservation efforts near their garden, participating in clean-up events and educational programs. Planning to utilize nursing skills in these conservation projects.

label: plans_and_intentions
value: Planning to utilize flexible hours to contribute to coastal conservation projects while keeping up with other commitments.
